_meta.description: DORA-relevant Calculated and Aggregate field formulas extracted from cwiedersheim ProcessUnity metadata

formulas.property: (DORA_02.02.0080) - End date of the contractual arrangement
formulas.displayName: (DORA_02.02.0080) - End date of the contractual arrangement
formulas.expression: IF([Indefinite Agreement?]!="No",[End of Agreement Date],"9999-12-31")

formulas.displayName: (DORA_02.02.0090) - Reason of the termination or ending of the contractual arrangement - External ID

formulas.displayName: (DORA_03.02.0030) - Type of code to identify the ICT third-party service provider - External ID

aggregate.sourceProperty: (DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider - External ID

formulas.property: Legal Entities using Agreement + Branch "|"
formulas.displayName: Legal Entities using Agreement + Branch "|"
formulas.expression: REPLACE([Decision],";","|")

formulas.property: VALIDATOR - DORA
formulas.displayName: VALIDATOR - DORA
formulas.expression:
IF([DORA Linked Service(s)]="","❌ DORA Linked Service(s) is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_02.01.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number]="","❌ 02.01.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_03.02.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number]="","❌ 03.02.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_03.02.0020) - Identification code of ICT third-party service provider]="","❌ 03.02.0020 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

formulas.property: (DORA_06.01.0020) - Licenced activity - External ID
formulas.displayName: (DORA_06.01.0020) - Licenced activity - External ID

formulas.displayName: (DORA_06.01.0040) - LEI of the financial entity - External ID

formulas.displayName: (DORA_06.01.0050) - Criticality or importance assessment - External ID

formulas.property: (DORA_06.01.0070) - Date of the last assessment of criticality or importance - BLANK DATE
formulas.displayName: (DORA_06.01.0070) - Date of the last assessment of criticality or importance - BLANK DATE
formulas.expression: IF([(DORA_06.01.0070) - Date of the last assessment of criticality or importance]="","9999-12-31",[(DORA_06.01.0070) - Date of the last assessment of criticality or importance])

formulas.property: (DORA_06.01.0100) - Impact of discontinuing the function - External ID
formulas.displayName: (DORA_06.01.0100) - Impact of discontinuing the function - External ID

formulas.property: VALIDATOR - DORA
formulas.displayName: VALIDATOR - DORA
formulas.expression:
IF([(DORA_06.01.0010) - Function Identifier]="","❌ DORA_06.01.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_06.01.0040) - LEI of the financial entity]="","❌ 06.01.0040 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

formulas.property: (DORA_05.01.0010) - Vendor ID Code
formulas.displayName: (DORA_05.01.0010) - Vendor ID Code

formulas.displayName: (DORA_05.01.0020) - Vendor Code Type

formulas.property: (DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services - External ID
formulas.displayName: (DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services - External ID
formulas.expression:
CASE(
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]="", "",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "Legal Entity Identfier (LEI)", "eba_qCO:qx2000",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "European Unified ID (EUID)", "eba_qCO:qx2002",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "National code", "eba_qCO:qx2001",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "Company registration number (CRN)", "eba_qCO:qx2003",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "Value added tax identification number (VAT)", "eba_qCO:qx2004",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "Passport Number", "eba_qCO:qx2005", "Error"
 
)

formulas.property: VALIDATOR - DORA
formulas.displayName: VALIDATOR - DORA
formulas.expression: IF([(DORA_05.02.0060) - Identification code of the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]="","❌ 05.02.0060 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

formulas.property: VALIDATOR - DORA
formulas.displayName: VALIDATOR - DORA
formulas.expression:
IF([(DORA_01.02.0010) - LEI of the entity]="","❌ 01.02.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([Branch?]="Yes" AND [(DORA_01.03.0010) - Identification code of the branch]="","❌ 01.03.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

formulas.property: (DORA_02.03.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number - External ID
formulas.displayName: (DORA_02.03.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number - External ID

aggregate.itemType: (DORA_02.03.0020) - Contractual arrangement linked to the contractual arrangement referred in RT.02.03.0010

formulas.property: VALIDATOR - DORA
formulas.displayName: VALIDATOR - DORA
formulas.expression:
IF([(DORA_02.03.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number]="","❌ 02.03.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_02.03.0020) - Contractual arrangement linked to the contractual arrangement referred in RT.02.03.0010]="","❌ 02.03.0020 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

formulas.property: Selected Vendor Fourth Party Id
formulas.displayName: Selected Vendor Fourth Party Id

aggregate.itemType: Check if the Fourth Party Exists

formulas.property: VALIDATOR - Fourth Party Review
formulas.displayName: VALIDATOR - Fourth Party Review
formulas.expression:
IF([Fourth Party Disposition]="", "❌ Subcontractor Disposition"+CRLF(),"")+

IF([Check if the Fourth Party Exists]="*Not Found*" AND LEFT([Fourth Party Disposition],2)="02", "❌ Select the correct Disposition."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([Check if the Fourth Party Exists]!="*Not Found*" AND LEFT([Fourth Party Disposition],2)="01", "❌ If you select an Existing Subcontractor, select the correct Disposition."+CRLF(),"")+

IF(LEFT([Fourth Party Disposition],2)="01" AND [Check if the Fourth Party relationship exists:]="" AND [Please enter the standardized name of the Fourth Party to be created:]="","❌ Please enter the standardized name of this Subcontractor."+CRLF(),"")+

IF(LEFT([Fourth Party Disposition],2)="02" AND [Check if the Fourth Party relationship exists:]!="", "❌ Select the correct Disposition."+CRLF(),"")+

IF(LEFT([Fourth Party Disposition],2)="02" AND [Selected Vendor Fourth Party Id]="","❌ Select Subcontracted Entity."+CRLF(),"")

formulas.property: Vendors whom Subcontract this Fourth Party

formulas.expression: REPLACE([Vendors whom Subcontract this Fourth Party List],";"," ,")

formulas.displayName: Vendors whom Subcontract this Fourth Party List

formulas.displayName: (DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider - External ID
formulas.expression:
CASE(
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]="", "",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "Legal Entity Identifier (LEI)", "eba_qCO:qx2000",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "European Unified ID (EUID)", "eba_qCO:qx2002",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "National code", "eba_qCO:qx2001",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "Company registration number (CRN)", "eba_qCO:qx2003",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "Value added tax identification number (VAT)", "eba_qCO:qx2004",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "Passport Number", "eba_qCO:qx2005", "Error"

)

CASE(

[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "Legal Entity Identifier (LEI)", "eba_qCO:qx2000",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "European Unified ID (EUID)", "eba_qCO:qx2002",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "National code", "eba_qCO:qx2001",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "Company registration number (CRN)", "eba_qCO:qx2003",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "Value added tax identification number (VAT)", "eba_qCO:qx2004",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "Passport Number", "eba_qCO:qx2005", 

"Error"

)
